title: Document Text
description: Extracted text chunks for a document included in an evidence pack.

document_id.description: Document identifier when included by the text extraction service.

chunks.description: Ordered text chunks extracted from the document.

chunk_id.description: Stable chunk index within the extracted text artifact.

page.description: One-based page number when the source document has pages.

sheet.description: Sheet name when the source document is a spreadsheet.

row.description: One-based row number when the source document is a spreadsheet.
